NVIDIA Supply Chain — Interactive

607 nodes · 898 edges · Bloomberg SPLC

Node color = tier from NVDA

Tier -5: Deepest upstream (7)
Tier -4: Deepest upstream (2)
Tier -3: Deep upstream (36)
Tier -2: Suppliers of suppliers (124)
Tier -1: Direct suppliers (161)
Tier 0: NVIDIA (focal) (1)
Tier +1: Direct customers (147)
Tier +2: Customers of customers (32)
Tier +3: Deep downstream (4)
Tier +4: Deepest downstream (74)
Tier +5: Deepest downstream (10)
Isolated / unconnected (9)

Node size = total degree

Circle size ∝ √(in + out edges in this graph). Bigger = more connected node.
low mid high

Edge = supplier → buyer

COGS (operating input)
CAPEX (capital equipment)
Uncategorized
⇄ Bidirectional (mutual supplier/customer)
Edge width ∝ buyer's cost %
Node tier uses dominant direction (stronger $ flow)
